rule_metadata.name: misc_ooxml_core_properties
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Identify meta xml content within OOXML documents

rules.rule_text:
rule misc_ooxml_core_properties
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150505"
		desc = "Identify meta xml content within OOXML documents"

	strings:
		$xml = "<?xml version="
		$core = "<cp:coreProperties xmlns:cp"

	condition:
		$xml at 0 and $core
}
